title: Commander Fan-out Worker Result (V8.12 #8)
description: Each ephemeral worker spawned by a Commander Fan-out Request returns this. Commander synthesises N of these into the final artifact.

worker_id.description: Unique ID of the spawned worker instance.

item_id.description: Matches the `id` in the commander_fanout_request items array.

output.description: Worker's output payload. Type defined by the commander's task_template; commonly markdown or structured JSON.

error.description: Populated when status != success. One-line root cause.
